title: Cozy Cheesy Scones with V Sterbottensost Cheese
description: Rich and gooey Irish dish featuring v sterbottensost cheese for a cozy and satisfying snack or dessert.

ingredients.name: V Sterbottensost Cheese (60g)
ingredients.notes: Use a dairy-free version if needed

ingredients.name: Plain Flour (120g)
ingredients.notes: All-purpose or gluten-free flour can be used

ingredients.name: Milk, whole (50ml)
ingredients.notes: Use milk to make the dough smoother and tastier

ingredients.name: Fodmap-friendly Tadka (if using non-dairy butter or dairy-free margarine, optional)
ingredients.notes: A few sprinkles of a mix of spices like cumin, coriander, and turmeric for flavor

instructions: In a mixing bowl, cream together the softened butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
Gradually add flour and V Sterbottensost cheese, mixing well until dough comes together.
If using Tadka, mix in a few sprinkles directly into the dough to enhance its flavor.
Shape the dough into 6-8 scones. Bake for about 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and puffed up.
Serve warm with a cup of tea or coffee.
